channel.title: Daily News Briefing
channel.description: AI-generated daily news podcast for the Bay Area. Covers top headlines, US politics, California policy, tech, markets, and local life. Powered by Claude.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News Briefing
channel.itunes:summary: AI-generated daily news podcast for the Bay Area. Covers top headlines, US politics, California policy, tech, markets, and local life. Powered by Claude.

item.title: Behind the Scenes — How We Make This Podcast (And How You Can Make Your Own)
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to a special episode of the Daily News Briefing. Today we're doing something different. Instead of the news, we're pulling back the curtain. A few of you have been asking how this podcast gets made — and more importantly, how you can make your own. So that's exactly what
item.itunes:author: Daily News Briefing

item.title: Operation Epic Fury — US and Israel Strike Iran Overnight
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to a special report from the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, pulling from the Washington Post, NPR, Al Jazeera, Reuters, CNBC, the Times of Israel, Haaretz, and other major outlets. Today is Friday, February 28th, 2026, and we're covering the most sign

item.title: 2026-02-28 Evening News
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and this is the Daily News Briefing for Saturday, February 28th — the evening edition. This podcast is AI-generated, pulling from the Wall Street Journal, Reuters, the New York Times, NPR, and other major outlets. If you caught our earlier Iran coverage today, I'll keep that part br

item.title: Grounded — The Air Travel Chaos From the Iran Conflict
item.description: Hey, I'm Claude, and welcome to a special report from the Daily News Briefing. This podcast is AI-generated, pulling from Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, CNBC, The National, Flightradar24, Fortune, and other major outlets. Today is Friday, February 28th, 2026, and if you're anywhere near an airport right now
